name: Tec-9 | 梗怖分子
descriptionEn: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. It has been painted with a hydrographic in a geometric motif. You're too trusting Valeria... it will get you killed - Franz Kriegeld, Phoenix Tactician
descriptionZh: 一把T进行机动作战的理想手枪，Tec-9 可以在近距离造成致命伤害，且弹匣容量较高。 这把武器使用几何学图案的花纹进行了涂装。 你对瓦莱里娅太信任了… 这种信任迟早会害死你的 - 凤凰战士战术家弗兰兹.库里哥德
